summary: Completed UI refactoring verification for Fractal module. Successfully verified that 'Current Forecast Influence' section was moved from MarketPhaseEngine to ConsensusPanel. MarketPhaseEngine now shows only Historical Phase Performance table. ConsensusPanel now has 3 columns: Vote by Horizon, Layer Influence, and new Forecast Influence. All tooltips display in English.
passed_tests: MarketPhaseEngine shows only 'Historical Phase Performance' table
MarketPhaseEngine does NOT contain 'Forecast Weighting' section (correctly removed)
MarketPhaseEngine does NOT contain 'Forecast Influence' section (correctly moved)
MarketPhaseEngine displays all 6 phases: MARKUP, MARKDOWN, RECOVERY, ACCUMULATION, CAPITULATION, DISTRIBUTION
MarketPhaseEngine table has columns: Phase, Success Rate, Avg Return, Risk Level
ConsensusPanel has 3 columns: Vote by Horizon, Layer Influence, Forecast Influence
Forecast Influence column displays all 6 horizons: 7d (9%), 14d (9%), 30d (28%), 90d (28%), 180d (40%), 365d (40%)
Forecast Influence tooltip displays in English: 'Model weighting applied to each horizon in projection calculations'
Layer Influence column shows: Structure (52%), Tactical (36%), Timing (12%)
seed_data_creation: None required - used live API data
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI refactoring complete. MarketPhaseEngine now only shows historical phase table. ConsensusPanel now has 3-column layout with new Forecast Influence column. horizonStack data from FractalPage.js is passed to ConsensusPanel via props. All tooltips are in English.
